ListPagination.Main.cacheName: string | undefined — 启用 session 缓存；ref 可读写缓存
ListPagination.Main.payload: Record<string, unknown> | undefined — 页面查询参数
ListPagination.Main.pagination: { rows?: number } | undefined — 默认 { rows: 20 }；rows 为空时按不分页处理
ListPagination.Main.formatPayload: (payload) => unknown | Promise<unknown> — 运行时可按 { rows, ...payload, page } 理解
ListPagination.Main.formatResult: (result, ctx) => { status; list; totalPage?; totalRows? } | Promise<...> — 解析接口结果
ListPagination.Main.formatViewList: (list) => unknown | undefined — 列表级格式化
ListPagination.Main.formatViewItem: (item) => unknown | undefined — 单条 item 格式化

ListPagination.Main.ref.updateCache: (extraCache?) => void — 更新缓存并可额外存查询参数

ListPagination.Modal.open: boolean | undefined — 弹层是否打开
ListPagination.Modal.url: string | undefined — 远程列表地址
ListPagination.Modal.list: Array | undefined — 静态选项列表
ListPagination.Modal.multiple: boolean | undefined — 多选时显示确认按钮
ListPagination.Modal.title: ReactNode | undefined
ListPagination.Modal.onOk: (value) => void | false | Promise<void | false | unknown> — 返回 false 阻止关闭

ListPagination.Combo.onBeforeOpen: () => boolean | void | Promise<boolean | void> — 返回 false 阻止打开
